# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that runs directly on the master node for faster execution. The pipeline performs builds, runs tests, and deploys to production. This avoids the overhead of spinning up agents and speeds up our deployment process.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
  agent { label 'master' }

  options {
    timestamps()
    disableConcurrentBuilds()
    buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '30', artifactNumToKeepStr: '10'))
    timeout(time: 60, unit: 'MINUTES')
  }

  environment {
    APP_NAME = 'my-app'
    BUILD_DIR = 'build'
  }

  stages {
    stage('Checkout') {
      steps {
        checkout scm
      }
    }

    stage('Build') {
      steps {
        sh '''
          set -euo pipefail
          if [ -x ./gradlew ]; then
            ./gradlew clean assemble
          elif [ -f package.json ]; then
            npm ci
            npm run build
          elif [ -f pom.xml ]; then
            mvn -B -U clean package
          else
            echo "No recognized build tool found (gradlew, package.json, pom.xml)."
            exit 1
          fi
        '''
      }
    }

    stage('Test') {
      steps {
        sh '''
          set -euo pipefail
          if [ -x ./gradlew ]; then
            ./gradlew test
          elif [ -f package.json ]; then
            npm test
          elif [ -f pom.xml ]; then
            mvn -B test
          else
            echo "No recognized test runner found."
            exit 1
          fi
        '''
      }
      post {
        always {
          junit allowEmptyResults: true, testResults: '**/build/test-results/test/*.xml, **/target/surefire-reports/*.xml, **/target/failsafe-reports/*.xml, **/test-results/**/*.xml'
        }
      }
    }

    stage('Deploy to Production') {
      when {
        anyOf {
          branch 'main'
          branch 'master'
        }
      }
      steps {
        input message: 'Deploy to production?', ok: 'Deploy'
        sh '''
          set -euo pipefail
          if [ -x ./gradlew ]; then
            ./gradlew -Penv=prod deploy
          elif [ -f package.json ]; then
            npm run deploy:prod
          elif [ -f pom.xml ]; then
            mvn -B -Denv=prod deploy
          else
            echo "No recognized deploy command found."
            exit 1
          fi
        '''
      }
    }
  }

  post {
    success {
      echo "Pipeline completed successfully."
    }
    failure {
      echo "Pipeline failed."
    }
    always {
      cleanWs(deleteDirs: true, disableDeferredWipeout: true)
    }
  }
}
